parent_issue.title: Jira CLI feature parity parent roadmap

spawn_decisions.reason: The current tool surface has no Pi subagent tool and no isolated mutating worker launcher; coordinator starts #104 locally as the critical path.
Issue #104 targeted red/green implementation is complete locally; full verification and automated review coverage remain pending.
Issue #104 full local gates passed; #105 and #107 are now ready by dependency status, but not spawned because this harness lacks subagent tooling.
Issue #105 full local gates passed; #106 is now ready by dependency status, but not spawned because this harness lacks subagent tooling.
No Pi subagent tool is available; #106 stream runner starts locally with manual GSD/TDD fallback.
Issue #106 full local gates passed; automated review coverage pending after implementation push.

Full Jira OpenAPI surface implemented locally because no Pi subagent tool is available: 620 operations, 333 writes, 268 direct reads, rest_query/body-variable metadata, sensitive/admin policy, docs/website data, and full local gates passed.
